title: Budgets, Interest, Loans, and Financial Decisions · Stakeholder Model Mission
summary: A community center facilities lead. The center needs a measured accessible layout, materials estimate, and financing comparison. Planned artifact: Deliver Measured Community Room Retrofit with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Convert quantities with unit factors that equal one and cancel dimensions explicitly.
Square or cube conversion factors when converting area and volume.
Use a consistent scale factor to move between drawings and actual dimensions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

steps.title: Produce a checked model result
steps.instruction: $1400 grows once per year at 6.0% for 2 years. Calculate the compounded value. Use the result to decide Loan Total Cost for an explainable household decision model.
steps.why: The Loan Total Cost result for an explainable household decision model is incomplete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.

content.text: Use P(1 + r)^t with P=1400, r=0.060, and t=2. Reconcile the result with this competency evidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Compare payment, total repayment, term, fees, and opportunity cost across loan offers.
